3289490.name: Impawlse Demo
3289490.description:
Welcome to Impawlse! This is a demo version of the game that includes:

  • 3 unique kittens

  • 1 medium room

  • Basic furniture

  • Arcade mode

Try the game and check if you like it!

Relax in this fun feline world and showcase your decorating skills to make the cats feel at home. You'll be a caretaker for cats with unique personalities and play fun mini-games with them. And of course, watch out for your curtains!

Discover each cat's personality, improve your friendship with them, and watch how they behave. Unlock new cats by completing various quests. Meet unique cats like Mantecao, the outlaw, or Malta, the little witch. No two cats are the same!

Watch out for your cup, a mischievous cat might try to knock it over, and keep an eye on your sofa, or you'll have to buy a new one. The cats interact with their environment in various ways! They'll want to play with you and run around with other cats, so keep them happy!

What would kittens do without a scratching post for their claws? Decorate the room in diorama view, buy various furniture and items, and place them wherever you like. Create the room of your dreams... well, the cats' dream room. After all, it's all about the kittens!

Pick a cat and turn on the arcade! Are you ready to play? Each cat has unique abilities. Use them wisely to navigate through the mazes. Also, take care of your garden, and make sure the kittens don't chew on your plants!
3289490.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
